zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn是Lisa Jane Start的女兒，於大約1532年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾沃特福德。她於1548年11月3日與John Carter在英國賀特福爾沃特福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1566年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾加斯東享年36歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾道爾頓 在 福內斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn是Lisa Jane Start的女儿，于大约1532年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾沃特福德。她于1548年11月3日与John Carter在英国賀特福爾沃特福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1566年在英国英格兰賀特福爾加斯東享年36岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾道爾頓 在 福內斯。

nameMeanings.name: Edlyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Edeline, an English form of Old French Adeline, a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal- (‘noble’) such as Adalheidis (the source of Alice; see Allis ). Edeline shows the influence of Old English names in Æthel- (‘noble’) which became Adel-, Edel- in Middle English.

variants.name: Allis
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Alis, Alice (Old French Adeliz, Ahelis, Aalis, Aliz). Alice, together with its pet form Alison, was one of the most popular names in both England and Scotland from the 13th century until the end of the medieval period. The personal name is of ancient Germanic origin, brought to England from France by the Normans; it is a shortened form of ancient Germanic Adalheidis, which is composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + haid ‘‘rank, worth’’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn was born about 1532, in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Lisa Jane Start. She married John Carter on 3 November 1548, in Watford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died about 1566, in Garston, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Dalton in Furness, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn est née environ 1532, à Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Lisa Jane Start. Elle a épousé John Carter le 3 novembre 1548, à Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1566, à Garston, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Dalton in Furness, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn wurde um 1532 in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Lisa Jane Start geboren. Sie hat am 3. November 1548 in Watford, Hertfordshire, England John Carter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb um 1566 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Garston, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dalton in Furness, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn è nata il circa 1532 nel Watford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Lisa Jane Start. Lei sposato John Carter il 3 novembre 1548, nel Watford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1566, nel Garston, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Dalton in Furness, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlynは約1532年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードでLisa Jane Startの娘として生まれた。1548年11月3日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードでJohn Carterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1566年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアガーストンで36歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアダルトン イン ファーネスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn(은)는 대략 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드에서 Lisa Jane Start의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1548년 11월 3일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드에서 John Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1566년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 가스턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 돌턴 인 퍼네스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Edlyn родилась около 1532 г. в местности ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её мать звали Lisa Jane Start. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Carter 3 ноября 1548 г. в местности ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла около 1566 г. в местности гарстон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности далтон ин фьурнесс, ланкашир, Англия.
